name: 2nd & 11th Lords in Evil Houses — Poverty Yoga
description: Lords of 2nd and 11th houses placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th create structural poverty yoga.

source_text.quote: If the lords of the 2nd and 11th are placed in evil houses (6th, 8th, 12th), the native will be poverty-stricken throughout life.

all_of: Lord of 2nd house is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house
Lord of 11th house is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house

interpretation.meaning: Both wealth houses (2nd=savings, 11th=gains) are destroyed when their lords occupy houses of debt, crisis, and loss. Structural poverty is indicated from birth.

metadata.notes: Fundamental BPHS poverty combination. When both wealth houses are compromised, financial crises become recurring.

name: 2nd & 11th Lords with Mars/Rahu — Insolvency Yoga
description: Lords of 2nd and 11th houses associated with Mars and Rahu create insolvency through aggression and deception.

source_text.quote: If the lords of the 2nd and 11th are associated with Mars and Rahu, the native faces insolvency, debts through aggression, and losses through deception.

all_of: Lord of 2nd house is conjunct or aspected by Mars or Rahu
Lord of 11th house is conjunct or aspected by Mars or Rahu

interpretation.meaning: Mars brings aggression and impulsive spending; Rahu brings deception and speculative loss. Together they contaminate both wealth houses, creating insolvency patterns.

metadata.notes: Mars-Rahu combination (Angarak Yoga variant) applied to wealth houses creates systematic insolvency.

name: Ascendant-12th House Exchange — Self-Created Poverty
description: Exchange between 1st lord and 12th lord creates self-destructive spending and poverty through personal choices.

source_text.quote: If the lord of the Lagna exchanges with the lord of the 12th, the native destroys his own wealth through excessive spending and poor choices.

all_of: Lord of 1st house is in the 12th house
Lord of 12th house is in the 1st house

interpretation.meaning: The self (1st) is bound to loss (12th). The native creates poverty through their own decisions — excessive generosity, wasteful spending, or self-sabotage.

metadata.notes: Parivartana yoga between 1st and 12th is one of the clearest indicators of self-inflicted financial difficulties.

name: Ascendant Lord in 8th with Ketu — Hidden Poverty
description: Lagna lord in 8th house with Ketu creates hidden financial destruction and sudden unexpected losses.

source_text.quote: If the lord of the Lagna occupies the 8th with Ketu, the native shall suffer sudden poverty from hidden causes and unexpected financial destruction.

all_of: Lord of 1st house is in the 8th house
Ketu is conjunct the 1st lord in 8th house (same sign)

interpretation.meaning: Lagna lord (self) trapped in the 8th (sudden events) with Ketu (detachment, hidden forces) creates a pattern where wealth is destroyed through mysterious, untraceable channels.

metadata.notes: Ketu's nature of sudden severance combined with 8th house transformation creates 'out of nowhere' financial collapses.

name: 5th & 9th Lords in 6th/12th — Speculative Loss Yoga
description: Lords of 5th (speculation) and 9th (fortune) placed in 6th or 12th create patterns of speculative financial loss.

source_text.quote: If the lords of the 5th and 9th are placed in the 6th or 12th, the native loses wealth through speculation, gambling, and misplaced trust in fortune.

any_of: Lord of 5th house is placed in 6th or 12th house
Lord of 9th house is placed in 6th or 12th house

interpretation.meaning: 5th house rules speculation and intelligence; 9th rules fortune. When both are in houses of debt/loss, speculative ventures consistently fail and fortune turns hostile.

metadata.notes: Strong indicator of consistent speculative failure. The native should be counseled against all forms of financial speculation.

name: Mars-Saturn in 2nd House — Wealth Destruction Yoga
description: Mars and Saturn together in the 2nd house systematically destroy accumulated wealth through conflict and restriction.

source_text.quote: Mars and Saturn in the 2nd house destroy family wealth through aggression, litigation, and restrictive circumstances beyond the native's control.

all_of: Mars is placed in the 2nd house
Saturn is placed in the 2nd house

interpretation.meaning: Mars (aggression, impulse) and Saturn (restriction, denial) in the house of wealth create a destructive cycle: impulsive spending followed by severe restriction, litigation expenses, and systematic erosion of savings.

metadata.notes: One of the most feared natal combinations for financial stability. Mars-Saturn in 2nd often manifests as recurring lawsuits draining wealth.

name: Moon with Rahu/Ketu + Malefic Aspect — Chronic Poverty
description: Moon conjunct Rahu or Ketu and aspected by malefic creates chronic poverty through mental instability and poor financial decisions.

source_text.quote: Moon conjoined with Rahu or Ketu and aspected by a malefic planet renders the native chronically poor, mentally unstable in financial matters, and unable to retain wealth.

all_of: Moon is conjunct Rahu or Ketu (same sign)
any_of: Moon is aspected by Sun (combust Moon)

interpretation.meaning: Afflicted Moon (mind) with nodes creates financial confusion and inability to make sound financial decisions. The native repeatedly makes poor choices driven by anxiety or illusion.

metadata.notes: Jataka Parijata emphasizes the mind-wealth connection. Afflicted Moon damages the decision-making capacity for finances.

name: Moon Weak in Vargas + Jupiter in Dusthana — No Wealth Retention
description: Moon weak in divisional charts combined with Jupiter in 6th/8th/12th prevents any meaningful wealth accumulation.

source_text.quote: If Moon is weak in Varga charts and Jupiter occupies a Dusthana, the native cannot retain wealth. Money flows away like water regardless of income level.

all_of: Jupiter is placed in 6th, 8th, or 12th house
any_of: Moon is in dark half (Krishna Paksha) and waning

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter (Dhana Karaka) in Dusthana removes wealth-generating capacity. Weak Moon removes the mental stability to retain whatever comes. Together they create a sieve-like financial pattern.

metadata.notes: Jupiter in Dusthana is a significant poverty indicator by itself. Combined with weak Moon it becomes nearly insurmountable without remedial measures.
